creator: gwright@antiope.com
text:
These are the sidekiq related pkgs I have installed:
```
root@gitlab:~ # pkg info | grep sidek
rubygem-gitlab-sidekiq-fetcher-0.8.0 Redis reliable queue pattern implemented in Sidekiq
rubygem-sentry-sidekiq-5.1.1   Client interface for the Sentry error logger
rubygem-sidekiq-6.4.2          Simple, efficient background processing for Ruby
rubygem-sidekiq-cron-1.4.0     Enables to set jobs to be run in specified time (using CRON notation)
root@gitlab:~ #
```
I'm not on sidekiq 6.5 yet.
